q0187 #187 ROW score 0.25 answer Right has image

q0196 #196 ROW score 0.25 answer Wrong

q0274 #274 ROW score 0.24 answer Right
If a driver has caused a major accident in violation of the traffic regulations which has caused heavy loss to public or private property, the driver is subject to a prison term of less than 3 years or a criminal detention.

q0043 #43 ROW score 0.29 answer Right has image
When a vehicle goes uphill on a mountain road, it should change to a lower gear in a timely, accurate and rapid manner so as to avoid a situation in which driving at a high gear can reduce the power of the engine.
q0070 #70 ROW score 0.26 answer Right
When a vehicle goes uphill, the driver should observe the road conditions and the length of the slope in advance and shift to the lower gear in a timely manner to ensure the vehicle has sufficient power and maintain appropriate engine RPM.
q0030 #30 ROW score 0.19 answer Right has image
When a vehicle goes down a long slope, it should run at a lower gear and fully use the engine to brake.

Best Master Matches
q0970 #970 MCQ score 0.27 answer B has image
When a vehicle is being overtaken by another vehicle, and there is a vehicle following behind, the driver should _____.
A.continue to speed up and run
B.turn slightly to the right side, keep a safe horizontal distance
answer
C.run by road center
D.speed up to the right side to yield
q0176 #176 MCQ score 0.27 answer C
When encountering a vehicle in the opposite direction forcing its way by using your lane, the driver should _______.
A.force the other side to drive by the right side
B.use the high beam light to warn the other side
C.voluntarily yield to the other side
answer
D.go ahead by the center of the road
q0484 #484 MCQ score 0.21 answer C
When encountering stopping in turn or slow-moving vehicles in front at an intersection where lanes are reduced or on a road that suddenly narrows or merges into one lane, the vehicle should _________.
q0441 #441 MCQ score 0.21 answer A
A vehicle that will turn right at an intersection but has a vehicle in front in the same lane waiting for the green light should ______________.
q0162 #162 MCQ score 0.21 answer B
After receiving an overtaking signal from a driver of a vehicle coming from behind, the driver should:
A.maintain the original speed
B.reduce speed, observe and keep to the right side of the road to yield
answer
C.speed up and go ahead by the right side
D.not yield
